006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.commons.bean;
018
019import java.lang.reflect.*;
020import java.util.*;
021
022import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
023
024/**
025 * Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the type-classification surface the bean-runtime types
026 * ({@link BeanMeta}-equivalents, {@link BeanPropertyMeta}-equivalents, etc.) need without coupling
027 * the bean-modeling layer to the marshalling-side {@code ClassMeta}.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * Marshalling-side {@code ClassMeta&lt;T&gt;} extends this class; bean-modeling-side code only sees
031 * {@link BeanInfo}.  The bean-modeling-side never instantiates this class directly — it always
032 * gets instances handed in by the marshalling layer (e.g. via builder calls like
033 * {@code BeanPropertyMeta.Builder#rawMetaType(ClassMeta)}).
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * All extra abstract methods declared here mirror methods that {@code ClassMeta} already implements,
037 * so {@code ClassMeta} satisfies this contract by virtue of its existing implementation.
038 *
039 * <h5 class='topic'>Thread safety</h5>
040 * Thread safety depends on implementation.
041 *
042 * @param <T> The raw class type this instance represents.
043 */
044public abstract class BeanInfo<T> extends ClassInfoTyped<T> {
045
046   /**
047    * Constructor.
048    *
049    * @param inner The class type.
050    */
051   protected BeanInfo(Class<T> inner) {
052      super(inner);
053   }
054
055   /**
056    * Constructor.
057    *
058    * @param inner The class type.
059    * @param innerType The generic type (if parameterized type).
060    */
061   protected BeanInfo(Class<T> inner, Type innerType) {
062      super(inner, innerType);
063   }
064
065   /**
066    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this class is a URI/URL or annotated with a URI marker.
067    *
068    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this class is a URI.
069    */
070   public abstract boolean isUri();
071
072   /**
073    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this class is classified as a bean.
074    *
075    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this class is a bean.
076    */
077   public abstract boolean isBean();
078
079   /**
080    * For array and {@code Collection} types, returns the type info of the element type, or <jk>null</jk>
081    * if this is not an array/collection.
082    *
083    * @return The element type info, or <jk>null</jk>.
084    */
085   @SuppressWarnings({
086      "java:S1452" // Element type is heterogeneous; wildcard is fundamental to the SPI contract.
087   })
088   public abstract BeanInfo<?> getElementType();
089
090   /**
091    * For {@code Map} types, returns the type info of the key type, or <jk>null</jk> if this is not a map.
092    *
093    * @return The key type info, or <jk>null</jk>.
094    */
095   @SuppressWarnings({
096      "java:S1452" // Key type is heterogeneous; wildcard is fundamental to the SPI contract.
097   })
098   public abstract BeanInfo<?> getKeyType();
099
100   /**
101    * For {@code Map} types, returns the type info of the value type, or <jk>null</jk> if this is not a map.
102    *
103    * @return The value type info, or <jk>null</jk>.
104    */
105   @SuppressWarnings({
106      "java:S1452" // Value type is heterogeneous; wildcard is fundamental to the SPI contract.
107   })
108   public abstract BeanInfo<?> getValueType();
109
110   /**
111    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this class can be instantiated using a no-arg constructor.
112    *
113    * @return <jk>true</jk> if a new instance can be created.
114    */
115   public abstract boolean canCreateNewInstance();
116
117   /**
118    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this class can be instantiated, optionally with the specified outer object
119    * for non-static inner classes.
120    *
121    * @param outer The outer object instance, or <jk>null</jk> if not applicable.
122    * @return <jk>true</jk> if a new instance can be created.
123    */
124   public abstract boolean canCreateNewInstance(Object outer);
125
126   /**
127    * Creates a new instance of this class.
128    *
129    * @return A new instance of the class.
130    * @throws ExecutableException If the class could not be instantiated.
131    */
132   @Override /* Overridden from ClassInfo to narrow return type to T. */
133   public abstract T newInstance() throws ExecutableException;
134
135   /**
136    * For {@link Optional} types, returns an empty optional default value, or <jk>null</jk>
137    * if this isn't an Optional.
138    *
139    * <p>
140    * Returns {@link Object} rather than {@code T} because the marshalling-side {@code ClassMeta} returns
141    * a wildcard {@code Optional<?>} which is not assignable to {@code T} under Java's type system.
142    *
143    * @return The default empty Optional value, or <jk>null</jk>.
144    */
145   public abstract Object getOptionalDefault();
146
147   /**
148    * Returns the {@link BeanConfigContext} associated with this type-info.
149    *
150    * <p>
151    * On the marshalling-side this returns the bean-modeling subset of the {@code MarshallingContext} that
152    * carried this type-info; on commons-side {@link BeanInfo} construction paths (none exist in-tree currently;
153    * {@link BeanInfo} is currently always realized by marshalling-side {@code ClassMeta}),
154    * this should return the {@code BeanConfigContext} the type-info was built against.
155    *
156    * @return The bean-modeling configuration carried alongside this type-info.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
157    */
158   public abstract BeanConfigContext getBeanConfigContext();
159
160   /**
161    * Returns the marshalling-side context associated with this type-info, as an opaque {@link Object}.
162    *
163    * <p>
164    * On the marshalling-side this is the {@code MarshallingContext} that carried this type-info; the return
165    * type is widened to {@link Object} so callers in {@code commons.bean} do not need to import
166    * {@code MarshallingContext}.  Callers cast to the marshalling-side type at the use site.
167    *
168    * @return The marshalling context, or <jk>null</jk> if none is associated with this type-info.
169    */
170   public abstract Object getMarshallingContext();
171}
